plugins.name: luly-v0-2-9
plugins.description: Author Luly flows end-to-end from a single natural-language prompt. v0.2.9: image-first mobile default (image always stacks on top of mobile slides unless overridden); brand research persistence — explicit Tier 1/2/3 escalation ladder with a research-log floor of 6 attempts before falling back to default styling; favicon fallback for academy course-icon — PNG brand-icon.png supported as iconUrl data URI when SVG isn't available.
